name: Sky ICT Public Company Limited
summary: Sky ICT Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiary, engages in information and communication technology (ICT), and system integration businesses in Thailand. The company operates through three segments: System Integration, Sales and Service, and Finance Lease segments. It offers consultation, design, installation, maintenance, procurement, and distribution of products and equipment related to the ICT and system integration. The company also provides CCTV, smart office, smart home, smart city, networks infrastructure, cyber security, and unified communication solutions; and network cabling services, including network cable management, single and multi-mode fiber optic cabling, LAN installation and cable management, and rack cabinet installation for network and server/CCTV security installation. In addition, it distributes IT products, such as computer, notebook, scanner, printer, toner, server, storage, switch, and software products; and non-IT solutions. Further, the company is involved in the finance lease business. Sky ICT Public Company Limited serves clients in the education, banking, security, government, and other sectors. The company was formerly known as CCN-TECH Public Company Limited and changed its name to Sky ICT Public Company Limited July 2017. Sky ICT Public Company Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
